basic_details.job_title: ABVIMS DRRML Hospital Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. RML Hospital
basic_details.short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. RML Hospital (ABVIMS DRRML Hospital) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of ABVIMS DRRML Hospital. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ABVIMS DRRML Hospital Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age who have MBBS, Post Graduate Degree MD/MS/DNB in CTVS, and 3 years teaching experience as Senior Resident/Tutor/Demonstrator/Registrar are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor vacancies. The walk-in interview process for ABVIMS

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is relaxable as per instructions of Government of India.

qualification.details: Recognized MBBS degree Post Graduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in concerned Specialty/Super Specialty (CTVS) At least three years teaching experience as Senior Resident or Tutor or Demonstrator or Registrar in the concerned specialty after obtaining PG degree

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Assistant Professor (CTVS).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Assistant Professor post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 1,23,500/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree and a Post Graduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in CTVS, along with at least three years of teaching experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 19th May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview venue?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at the ABVIMS DRRML Hospital office in New Delhi.
